services.metaDescription: Professional cleaning services in Tallinn. Regular cleaning, deep cleaning, move in/out cleaning, office cleaning, upholstery cleaning, and window cleaning.
services.pageDescription: From regular maintenance to specialized cleaning, we have a service for every need. All services include professional equipment and eco-friendly products.
services.ctaTitle: Not sure which service you need?
services.ctaDescription: Contact us and we will help you choose the right cleaning service for your home.

regular.title: Regular Cleaning
regular.description: Professional maintenance cleaning to keep your home consistently fresh and comfortable.
regular.longDescription: Professional maintenance cleaning designed to keep your home consistently fresh, clean, and comfortable. Our regular cleaning service is perfect for busy families and professionals who want to maintain a clean home without the hassle. We bring all supplies and equipment, so you can simply relax while we take care of everything.
regular.perfectFor: Perfect for weekly or bi-weekly home maintenance. Most popular among busy professionals and families in Tallinn.

deep.title: Deep Cleaning
deep.description: Detailed cleaning for homes that need extra care or have not been professionally cleaned recently.
deep.longDescription: A detailed cleaning service recommended for homes that require extra care or have not been professionally cleaned recently. Our deep cleaning service goes beyond the surface to ensure every corner of your home is thoroughly cleaned. This is the perfect choice if you are moving into a new place, preparing for guests, or simply want a fresh start.
deep.perfectFor: Ideal for seasonal cleaning, first-time service, or preparing your home for special occasions.

moveOut.title: Move In/Out Cleaning
moveOut.description: Comprehensive cleaning designed for empty homes before moving in or after moving out.
moveOut.longDescription: A comprehensive cleaning designed for empty homes before moving in or after moving out. This service ensures your property is spotless for the next occupant or ready to welcome you to your new home. Our move-out cleaning meets the standards expected by landlords and property managers in Tallinn, helping you protect your deposit.
moveOut.perfectFor: Recommended for tenants, landlords, and property managers. Help protect your deposit with professional cleaning.

additionalContent.title: Why Professional Move-Out Cleaning Matters in Tallinn
additionalContent.intro: Moving out of a rental apartment in Tallinn can be stressful, especially when your deposit is on the line. Many landlords in Estonia require the property to be returned in the same condition it was received, which often means professional-level cleaning.
additionalContent.depositText: We understand that getting your full deposit back matters. Our thorough move-out cleaning service is designed to meet the standards expected by landlords and property management companies in Tallinn and Harjumaa. We pay attention to the details that landlords check: limescale on taps, grease in the oven, dust in cabinets, and more.
additionalContent.checklistIntro: Based on our experience working with tenants across Tallinn, here are the most common areas landlords inspect:
checklistItems: Bathroom fixtures (limescale on taps, shower glass, toilet)
additionalContent.rendinTitle: Avoid Disputes with Rendin and Landlords
additionalContent.rendinText: If you are renting through Rendin or a similar service, professional cleaning documentation can help resolve any disputes about the property condition. We provide thorough cleaning that meets professional standards.

deposit.question: Will this cleaning help me get my deposit back?
deposit.answer: Our move-out cleaning is designed to meet the standards landlords expect. While we cannot guarantee deposit return (that depends on your landlord and lease terms), our thorough cleaning addresses all the common issues landlords check.

booking.question: How far in advance should I book?
booking.answer: We recommend booking at least 3-5 days in advance. However, we often accommodate last-minute requests if our schedule allows.

satisfaction.question: What if my landlord is not satisfied?
satisfaction.answer: Customer satisfaction is our priority. If any issues are raised within 24 hours of cleaning, we will return to address them at no additional cost.

oven.question: Do you clean the oven inside?
oven.answer: Yes, interior appliance cleaning is included in our move-out service. We clean inside the oven, refrigerator, and microwave.

office.title: Office Cleaning
office.description: Reliable cleaning services for offices and small commercial spaces.
office.longDescription: Reliable cleaning services for offices and small commercial spaces. Keep your workspace professional, clean, and welcoming for your employees and clients. A clean office improves productivity, makes a great impression on visitors, and contributes to a healthier work environment.
office.perfectFor: Perfect for maintaining a professional workspace. Flexible scheduling available for daily, weekly, or monthly service.

upholstery.title: Upholstery Cleaning
upholstery.description: Professional deep cleaning for sofas, armchairs, and other upholstered furniture.
upholstery.longDescription: Professional deep cleaning for sofas, armchairs, and other upholstered furniture to remove dirt, stains and odors. Over time, upholstered furniture accumulates dust, allergens, and stains that regular vacuuming cannot remove. Our professional cleaning restores your furniture to its original freshness and extends its lifespan.
upholstery.perfectFor: Contact us for a personalized quote based on your furniture type and condition.

window.title: Window Cleaning
window.description: Professional window cleaning service for crystal clear views.
window.longDescription: Professional window cleaning service for crystal clear views. We ensure streak-free, sparkling clean windows that let the light shine through. Clean windows make a significant difference in how bright and welcoming your space feels.
window.perfectFor: Contact us for a personalized quote based on the number and size of windows.

includes.title: What is Included
regular: Dusting and cleaning all accessible surfaces
Kitchen surface and appliance exterior cleaning
deep: Interior cleaning of kitchen appliances (oven, microwave, refrigerator)
Detailed bathroom cleaning with limescale removal
Cleaning behind and under furniture where accessible
Cleaning reachable wall areas when necessary
Thorough cleaning of all surfaces including baseboards
Light fixture and ceiling fan dusting
moveOut: Cleaning inside and outside of cabinets and drawers
Limescale removal from taps and showerheads
Cleaning reachable wall areas if needed
Cleaning all surfaces, mirrors, and light switches
Removal of dust from all corners and edges
office: Door handle and light switch sanitizing

about.metaDescription: Learn about LGX Puhastus, a professional cleaning company in Tallinn founded by Ana in 2024. Your home in caring hands.
about.pageDescription: Your home in caring hands. We are a professional cleaning company serving Tallinn and Harjumaa since 2024.
about.storyParagraph1: LGX Puhastus was founded by Ana, a Brazilian who moved to Tallinn with a passion for creating clean, welcoming spaces. After working in the cleaning industry and seeing a need for more personal, trustworthy service, she decided to start her own company in 2024.
about.storyParagraph2: Our philosophy is simple: we treat every home as if it were our own. We understand that when you give someone your keys, you are placing a lot of trust in them. We take that responsibility seriously.
about.storyParagraph3: Today, we serve families, professionals, and property managers across Tallinn and the surrounding Harjumaa region. Our clients come back to us because they know they can count on consistent, high-quality cleaning with a personal touch.
about.valuesDescription: Everything we do is guided by these core principles.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: We understand that inviting someone into your home requires trust. We treat every home with respect and integrity.

care.title: Care
care.description: We clean your home as if it were our own. Every detail matters because your comfort matters to us.

attention.title: Attention to Detail
attention.description: We believe great cleaning is in the details. Nothing is overlooked, nothing is rushed.

about.ctaDescription: Let us show you what caring hands can do for your home.

contact.pageDescription: Ready to book a cleaning or have questions? We are here to help. Reach out to us and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.movingOutDescription: We often accommodate last-minute requests. Contact us via WhatsApp for the fastest response.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your cleaning needs...
form.willReply: We will get back to you within 24 hours.

gallery.pageDescription: Real results from real homes. See the difference professional cleaning makes.
gallery.ctaDescription: Let us bring the same level of care and attention to your home.

calculator.metaDescription: Get an instant cleaning quote for your home in Tallinn. Select your property type and service to see estimated pricing.

flatRate.title: Flat-Rate Pricing
flatRate.description: Our prices are based on property size and service type, not hourly rates. You know what you pay upfront.

discounts.title: Discounts for Regular Clients
discounts.description: Book weekly or bi-weekly cleanings and enjoy discounted rates for your ongoing service.

allInclusive.title: All-Inclusive Service
allInclusive.description: Our team brings all professional cleaning products and equipment. No additional costs.

customQuotes.title: Custom Quotes Available
customQuotes.description: For special requests or unique properties, contact us for a personalized quote.

calculator.needMoreInfo: Need more information about our services?
calculator.whatsappMessage: Hi! I am interested in {service} for my {property}. Estimated price: from {price} EUR.

supplies.question: Do I need to provide cleaning supplies?
supplies.answer: No. Our team brings all professional cleaning products and equipment.

duration.question: How long does a cleaning service take?
duration.answer: It depends on the size and condition of the property. Most regular cleanings take between 2 to 4 hours.

presence.question: Do I need to be home during the cleaning?
presence.answer: No, many of our clients provide access to the property while they are away. We are trusted by homeowners across Tallinn.

booking.question: How can I book a cleaning?
booking.answer: You can contact us through WhatsApp, phone or our website contact form. We typically respond within a few hours.

areas.question: What areas do you serve?
areas.answer: We provide cleaning services in Tallinn and Harjumaa, including all districts of the city.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept bank transfer and cash payments.

satisfaction.question: What if I am not satisfied with the cleaning?
satisfaction.answer: Customer satisfaction is very important to us. If you are not satisfied with any part of the service, please contact us within 24 hours and we will return to correct the issue at no additional cost.

testimonial1.name: Maria K.
testimonial1.text: Ana and her team did an amazing job with our move-out cleaning. The apartment looked better than when we moved in. Highly recommend!

testimonial2.name: Johan S.
testimonial2.text: We use LGX Puhastus for weekly cleaning and the consistency is excellent. Our home always feels fresh and welcoming.

testimonial3.name: Elena R.
testimonial3.text: Very professional and trustworthy. I feel comfortable leaving my keys with them. The attention to detail is impressive.
